description: 知乎专栏发布流程（v1.0.4：图片转存检测改为 zhimg.com 域名 + 新增封面设置环节 + 确认发布按钮改进）

steps.descript: 导航到知乎专栏写作页

steps.ai_intent: 找到知乎专栏写作页的正文编辑区并点击
找到知乎专栏写作页的正文编辑区并填入正文内容

steps.descript: 等待 5 秒让知乎处理粘贴内容（图片开始转存）

steps.value: const findEditor = () => document.querySelector('.public-DraftEditor-content, .ProseMirror, [contenteditable="true"][class*="DraftEditor"]') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); const ed = findEditor(); if (!ed) return JSON.stringify({ reason: '编辑器未找到' }); const imgs = ed.querySelectorAll('img'); const info = []; let transferred = 0; let pending = 0; imgs.forEach(img => { const src = img.src || ''; if (src.includes('zhimg.com')) { transferred++; } else { pending++; } info.push(src.slice(0, 80)); }); const loadingEls = ed.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload"], [class*="loading"], [class*="progress"], [class*="pending"]'); return JSON.stringify({ totalImgs: imgs.length, transferred, pending, loadingEls: loadingEls.length, imgSrcs: info.slice(0,5), editorCls: (ed.className||'').slice(0,80) });
steps.descript: 诊断：检查图片转存状态（zhimg.com=已转存，其他=未转存）

steps.value: const findEditor = () => document.querySelector('.public-DraftEditor-content, .ProseMirror, [contenteditable="true"][class*="DraftEditor"]') || document.querySelector('[contenteditable="true"]'); const editor = findEditor(); if (!editor) return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reason: '编辑器未找到，跳过等待' }); const startTime = Date.now(); const maxWait = 90000; while (Date.now() - startTime < maxWait) { const ed = findEditor(); if (!ed) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } const imgs = ed.querySelectorAll('img'); if (imgs.length === 0) { const loadingEls0 = ed.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload"], [class*="loading"], [class*="progress"], [class*="pending"]'); if (loadingEls0.length === 0) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, waited: Date.now() - startTime, totalImgs: 0, reason: '无图片，无需等待' }); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); continue; } let notTransferred = 0; imgs.forEach(img => { const src = img.src || ''; if (!src.includes('zhimg.com')) notTransferred++; }); const loadingEls = ed.querySelectorAll('[class*="upload"], [class*="loading"], [class*="progress"], [class*="pending"]'); if (notTransferred === 0 && loadingEls.length === 0) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, waited: Date.now() - startTime, totalImgs: imgs.length, reason: '所有图片已转存到 zhimg.com' }); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 3000)); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, waited: maxWait, reason: '等待超时，仍有图片未转存到 zhimg.com' });
steps.descript: 等待图片转存完成（v1.0.4：检测 zhimg.com 域名，每 3 秒检测一次，最多 90 秒）

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .Button')); const result = btns.filter(b => { const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; }).map(b => ({ text: (b.innerText||b.textContent||'').trim().slice(0,30), cls: (b.className||'').slice(0,80), tag: b.tagName, disabled: b.disabled })); return JSON.stringify({ count: result.length, buttons: result.slice(0, 20) });
steps.descript: 诊断：列出发布面板中所有可见按钮

steps.value: const coverEls = []; document.querySelectorAll('[class*="cover"], [class*="Cover"], [class*="thumbnail"], [class*="thumb"]').forEach(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 0 && r.height > 0) { coverEls.push({ tag: el.tagName, cls: (el.className||'').slice(0,100), text: (el.innerText||'').trim().slice(0,50), ph: el.getAttribute('data-placeholder')||'', w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }); } }); const uploadInputs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input[type="file"]')).map(inp => { const r = inp.getBoundingClientRect(); return { accept: inp.accept, ph: inp.getAttribute('data-placeholder')||'', w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; }); return JSON.stringify({ coverEls: coverEls.slice(0, 8), uploadInputs: uploadInputs.slice(0, 4) });
steps.descript: 诊断：查找发布面板中的封面设置区域

steps.value: const coverArea = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="cover"], [class*="Cover"]')).find(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 50 && r.height > 50; }); if (!coverArea) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到封面区域' }); const uploadBtn = coverArea.querySelector('input[type="file"]') || coverArea.querySelector('[class*="upload"], [class*="add"]'); if (uploadBtn && uploadBtn.tagName === 'INPUT' && uploadBtn.type === 'file') { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reason: '找到封面 file input', accept: uploadBtn.accept }); } const clickBtn = coverArea.querySelector('button, [role="button"], [class*="upload"], [class*="add"]'); if (clickBtn) { clickBtn.click(); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, reason: '已点击封面上传按钮', cls: (clickBtn.className||'').slice(0,80) }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '封面区域无可点击的上传按钮', coverCls: (coverArea.className||'').slice(0,80) });
steps.descript: 尝试点击封面上传按钮（v1.0.4 新增）

branch_steps.trigger_click: const coverArea = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[class*="cover"], [class*="Cover"]')).find(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 50 && r.height > 50; }); if (coverArea) { const btn = coverArea.querySelector('button, [role="button"], [class*="upload"], [class*="add"]'); if (btn) { btn.click(); return true; } } return false;
branch_steps.descript: 上传封面图（触发文件选择对话框并上传）

steps.descript: 封面设置分支（有 cover_image_url 时执行）

steps.selector: //button[contains(text(),'确认并发布')] | //button[contains(text(),'确认发布')] | //button[contains(text(),'发布') and not(contains(text(),'草稿'))][last()] | //button[contains(@class,'PublishSubmit')] | //button[contains(@class,'submitButton')]
steps.ai_intent: 找到知乎发布面板中的「确认并发布」按钮并点击（按钮文字可能是「确认并发布」「确认发布」「发布」等）
